Interface GLFWWindow.WindowListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
GLFWWindow.WindowAdapter
Enclosing class:
GLFWWindow
public static interface GLFWWindow.WindowListener
A window event listener interface.
Author:
Matthew Tropiano

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onBlur(GLFWWindow window)
    Called on a window blur event.
    void
    onClose(GLFWWindow window)
    Called on a window close event.
    void
    onContentScaleChange(GLFWWindow window, float x, float y)
    Called on a window content scale change event.
    void
    onFocus(GLFWWindow window)
    Called on a window focus event.
    void
    onFramebufferChange(GLFWWindow window, int width, int height)
    Called on a window frame buffer change event.
    void
    onIconify(GLFWWindow window)
    Called on a window iconified event.
    void
    onMaximize(GLFWWindow window)
    Called on a window maximized event.
    void
    onMouseEntered(GLFWWindow window)
    Called when the mouse cursor enters the window.
    void
    onMouseExited(GLFWWindow window)
    Called when the mouse cursor exits the window.
    void
    onPositionChange(GLFWWindow window, int x, int y)
    Called on a window position change event.
    void
    onRefresh(GLFWWindow window)
    Called on a window refresh event.
    void
    onRestore(GLFWWindow window)
    Called on a window restore event.
    void
    onSizeChange(GLFWWindow window, int width, int height)
    Called on a window size change event.

  • Method Details

    • onClose

      void onClose(GLFWWindow window)
      Called on a window close event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onRefresh

      void onRefresh(GLFWWindow window)
      Called on a window refresh event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onFocus

      void onFocus(GLFWWindow window)
      Called on a window focus event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onBlur

      void onBlur(GLFWWindow window)
      Called on a window blur event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onIconify

      void onIconify(GLFWWindow window)
      Called on a window iconified event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onRestore

      void onRestore(GLFWWindow window)
      Called on a window restore event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onMaximize

      void onMaximize(GLFWWindow window)
      Called on a window maximized event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onMouseEntered

      void onMouseEntered(GLFWWindow window)
      Called when the mouse cursor enters the window.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onMouseExited

      void onMouseExited(GLFWWindow window)
      Called when the mouse cursor exits the window.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.

    • onPositionChange

      void onPositionChange(GLFWWindow window, int x, int y)
      Called on a window position change event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.
      x - the new x-coordinate (upper-left corner).
      y - the new y-coordinate (upper-left corner).

    • onSizeChange

      void onSizeChange(GLFWWindow window, int width, int height)
      Called on a window size change event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.
      width - the new width.
      height - the new height.

    • onFramebufferChange

      void onFramebufferChange(GLFWWindow window, int width, int height)
      Called on a window frame buffer change event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.
      width - the new width.
      height - the new height.

    • onContentScaleChange

      void onContentScaleChange(GLFWWindow window, float x, float y)
      Called on a window content scale change event.
      Parameters:
      window - the source window.
      x - the x-scaling.
      y - the y-scaling.
